data.body: In designated areas of BC, Canada, we have a “Speculation Tax” based on occupancy. In 2026, if you don’t live in your house for at least 6 months, you get taxed 0.5% for Canadians and 3% for foreign owners. In 2024, more than $79 million collected helped fund affordable housing projects. 🇨🇦
